## 4. Architecture Insights

### CNN Backbone Effect

Comparing models with the **same temporal model** isolates the CNN effect:

- **GRU pairs:** Model A (EfficientNet) vs Model D (MobileNetV2) → EfficientNet captures richer spatial features.
- **LSTM pairs:** Model C (EfficientNet) vs Model B (MobileNetV2) → Same comparison across LSTM variants.

### Temporal Model Effect

Comparing models with the **same CNN backbone** isolates the RNN effect:

- **EfficientNet pairs:** Model A (GRU) vs Model C (LSTM) → GRU often trains faster; LSTM may capture longer dependencies.
- **MobileNetV2 pairs:** Model D (GRU) vs Model B (LSTM) → GRU simpler but often comparable on short sequences.

### CBAM Attention

All four models integrate CBAM (Channel + Spatial Attention) between the CNN feature extractor and global pooling. This helps the network focus on salient degradation markers (mold spots, color shifts, texture changes) rather than background noise. ~205K parameters added.
